workspace.dialog.addProjectDescription: Select a project directory to import into Cradle
workspace.dialog.addWorkspaceLocalDescri: Local workspaces use this machine as host and keep your files where they are.
workspace.dialog.multiFolderDescription: Create one Cradle workspace that links several local project folders.
workspace.dialog.multiFolderEntriesDescr: Each folder gets a short name and an absolute local path.
workspace.dialog.multiFolderNameDescript: Used for the Cradle-owned workspace folder.
workspace.dialog.recognitionAlreadyImpor: This folder is already imported as a workspace.
workspace.dialog.recognitionDescription: This folder contains a cradle-workspace.json. Open it as a linked Cradle Workspace that joins its folders.
workspace.dialog.recognitionExperimental: This enables the experimental Workspace feature for Cradle.
workspace.dialog.recognitionInvalidDescr: This folder contains a cradle-workspace.json, but it could not be read. Add the folder as a single project instead.
workspace.dialog.remoteBrowseDescription: Pick a directory on {{hostName}}. Cradle will register it there if needed, then add it here.
workspace.dialog.remoteBrowseHint: Browse {{hostName}}’s filesystem to add any folder — not only workspaces already listed below.
workspace.dialog.remoteNoExistingWorkspa: No workspaces on this host yet. Browse a folder to create one remotely and add it here.
workspace.migrate.description: Move issues, kanban boards, and automation definitions into another workspace.
workspace.migrate.entities.description: Choose which entity types to move to the target.
workspace.migrate.entities.label: What to migrate
workspace.migrate.entities.none: Select at least one entity type to migrate.
workspace.migrate.entity.automation.desc: Automation rules are reassigned to the target workspace.
workspace.migrate.entity.issues.desc: Statuses, milestones, and parent links are reconciled.
workspace.migrate.entity.kanban.desc: Boards are reassigned to the target workspace.
workspace.migrate.help.automation: Automation definitions are reassigned to the target workspace.
workspace.migrate.help.body: Entities are moved out of the source workspace and into the target. Issue statuses and milestones are reconciled against the target; number conflicts are auto-resolved.
workspace.migrate.help.issues: Statuses map by name, unmapped fall back to the target default. Parent links within the source are preserved.
workspace.migrate.help.kanban: Boards are reassigned to the target workspace.
workspace.migrate.help.title: What migration does
workspace.migrate.mappings.description: Remap source fields onto the target. Unmapped statuses fall back to the target default; unmapped milestones are cleared.
workspace.migrate.mappings.empty.milesto: No milestones in the source workspace
Nothing to map — milestones will be cleared on arrival.
workspace.migrate.mappings.empty.statuse: No statuses in the source workspace
Nothing to map — statuses will use the target default.
workspace.migrate.mappings.onlyUnmappedH: Hide rows that already match a target field by name.
workspace.migrate.mappings.skippedBody: Issues are not part of this migration, so there is nothing to map here. Continue to review.
workspace.migrate.mappings.title: Field mappings
workspace.migrate.review.description: Run a dry-run preview to see exactly what will change before committing.
workspace.migrate.review.notRunBody: Run a dry-run preview to project the changes before you commit.
workspace.migrate.review.title: Review migration
workspace.migrate.review.warningBody: Entities will leave {{target}} once the migration commits. This cannot be undone.
workspace.migrate.review.warningTitle: This moves data out of the source workspace
workspace.migrate.route.description: Pick where entities should move to.
workspace.migrate.route.label: Route
workspace.migrate.source.label: Source
workspace.migrate.target.label: Target
workspace.migrate.target.noneAvailable: No other workspaces available. Create another workspace first.
workspace.migrate.title: Migrate workspace
